episodes.title: Why People Think This Is a Cult in South Africa
episodes.description:
People don’t just “join cults”,  they’re pulled in.
In this video, we break down why groups like the one in KwaMaphumulo are growing in South Africa, the psychology behind it, and what cases like the Jonestown Massacre reveal about how it really works.

#SouthAfrica #Cults #Psychology #Jonestown #CurrentAffairs #SocialIssues #Documentary #Geopolitics
